name: Apparatus Venetian Blinds
pitch: A high-fidelity image gallery transition where horizontal slats rotate 180 degrees in a staggered cascade to reveal the next image.

lifecycle.idle: Subtle 3D tilting on mouse movement and breathing opacity fluctuation.
lifecycle.discovery: Mouse hover causes the active slats to slightly lean (3D shadow tilt) indicating rotatability.
lifecycle.buildUp: Press/click initiates the 180-degree slat flip sequence.
lifecycle.peak: Mid-rotation (90 degrees) light streak sweep and vertical split.
lifecycle.recovery: Springs settle at 180 degrees (new image fully revealed) with velocity decay.
